# RizFlow

> RizFlow builds custom agentic-AI systems for businesses and SMEs. We automate workflows, communications, invoicing, and operations — so business owners can run their business from their phone. Based in Singapore, serving clients globally with a 90-day results guarantee and no lock-in contracts.

## Services

- [Custom AI Agent Services & Pricing](https://rizflow.co/services): Full-stack agentic-AI systems starting from $1,800/mo with 90-day guarantee. Three tiers: Starter, Growth, Scale.
- [Free Discovery Audit](https://rizflow.co/audit): Book a free audit to find out how much time and money AI automation can save your business. Takes 30 seconds.
- [Live AI Demo](https://rizflow.co/demo): See RizFlow agents in action for your industry — interactive demo showing real workflows.

## Case Studies

- [RainFreshSG Case Study](https://rizflow.co/case-study/rainfresh-sg): How a Singapore fresh produce business automated 80% of operations with custom AI agents. Includes before/after metrics and live demo.

## About

- [About RizFlow](https://rizflow.co/about): Founded by Aariz Arfan, building AI systems for business owners since 2024. Nanyang Polytechnic Business Management student. Building in public with full transparency.

## Knowledge Base

- [Agentic AI Explained](https://rizflow.co/blog/agentic-ai-explained): What agentic-AI is, how it differs from traditional automation and chatbots, and why it matters for SMEs and business owners.
- [Business Automation ROI](https://rizflow.co/blog/business-automation-roi): Data-driven analysis of return on investment from business automation with real cost savings and time recovery figures.
- [AI Operations for Agencies Guide](https://rizflow.co/blog/ai-operations-for-agencies-guide): How agencies can leverage AI operations to scale service delivery without proportional headcount growth.
- [Singapore Business Tech Trends](https://rizflow.co/blog/singapore-business-tech-trends): Technology adoption trends, digital transformation statistics, and AI readiness data for Singapore SMEs.
- [Client Onboarding Automation](https://rizflow.co/blog/client-onboarding-automation): Automating the client onboarding workflow with AI agents — from inquiry to activation in minutes instead of days.
- [Email Management AI](https://rizflow.co/blog/email-management-ai): How AI agents manage business email and communications, triaging priorities and drafting responses.

## FAQ

- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://rizflow.co/faq): Common questions about RizFlow's AI services, pricing, onboarding process, 90-day guarantee, and how agentic-AI differs from chatbots.

- [Privacy Policy & Terms of Service](https://rizflow.co/privacy-terms): RizFlow's data handling practices, PDPA compliance, and terms of service.
